reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. Mucha espera. El playero charlando con su compañero en vez de atender a la gente. Uno solo atendiendo para una fila larguísima de autos. Servicompras cerrado antes de las 22h en plena temporada.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Long waits. The attendant was chatting with his colleague instead of helping customers. Only one person was serving a very long line of cars. The convenience store was closed before 10 pm in the middle of peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROd3JqNnJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha cola ,y el parque es selectivo del ACA a pesar de estar abierto sin tejido ni puertas ,en 2023 no tiene sentido .
Ví encargada de ypf echando gente a pesar de haber comprado y ser socio serviclub.

Muy fea experiencia..

(Translated by Google)
Long queues, and the parking lot is selectively managed by the ACA (Automobile Club of Catalonia) despite being open without fencing or gates; in 2023, this makes no sense. I saw a YPF employee turning people away even though they had bought gas and were Serviclub members.

A very unpleasant experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMUtIeG53RRAB
